title: Fluffy Canadian Garlic Stir-fry
description: A comforting date-night dish featuring a delicate blend of garlic and herbs, seasoned perfectly for a fluffy texture and suitable as a low-carb option.
instructions: Place chicken breast in a bowl, season with salt, pepper, and a pinch of dried dill. Let sit for 5 minutes to marinate slightly.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Add water chestnuts and bell peppers; sauté until softened, about 2-3 minutes.
Add finely chopped onion to the skillet and cook until translucent, approximately 1 minute. Stir in garlic slices, cooking until fragrant but not burnt, around 1 minute more.
Combine marinated chicken with onion mixture. Cook for 5 minutes on each side or until fully cooked through. Serve hot.
